overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a snowy medieval fortress settlement at night. The character walks through torch-lit courtyards with military tents, ascends stone staircases and wooden ramparts, and traverses a cliffside overlook with views of the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy military courtyard with canvas tents and campfires

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy courtyard past military tents and campfire braziers

entered.detail: Large beige canvas military tent with open front showing warm interior light
Metal brazier with burning fire providing orange torchlight
Tall medieval stone wall forming the fortress perimeter
Rustic wooden fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a snowy military courtyard at night, with large canvas tents and burning campfires illuminating the area. The character walks forward through the snow-covered ground, passing between stone walls and wooden fences while snow falls gently.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortress interior pathway approaching stone stairs

events.description: begins ascending stone staircase leading to upper ramparts

agents.ego_description: walking toward and climbing stone stairs between wooden fortifications

entered.detail: Stone steps leading upward to the fortress ramparts

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the courtyard, the character approaches and begins climbing a stone staircase. The wooden ramparts become visible on the right as the tents recede behind, and the stone wall moves closer to the left side of the frame.

events.description: exits covered stairway onto open cliffside path with ocean view becoming visible

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs and walking along elevated ramparts with snow falling

entered.detail: Stacked wooden barrels beside the stone wall
Tall cylindrical stone tower with narrow windows

segments.scene_description: The character ascends through a narrow enclosed stairway with wooden walkways and stacked barrels. As they climb higher, a stone tower comes into view in the distance, and the scene opens up to reveal the ocean horizon beyond the fortress walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside overlook with ocean view and stone tower

events.description: torchlight diminishes as character moves away from fires, more visible moonlight illuminating the snow

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge overlooking the ocean, passing a stone tower and continuing along the snowy path

entered.detail: Dark ocean visible beyond the cliff edge under the night sky
Leafless winter trees along the cliffside path

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open cliffside path with expansive views of the ocean under the night sky. They pass close to a stone tower and continue along the snow-covered trail lined with bare trees and wooden fences, moving away from the artificial torchlight into areas illuminated by moonlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, torch-lit military encampment up to a moonlit cliffside overlooking the ocean. It begins in a snowy courtyard filled with canvas tents and burning campfires, moving forward through the falling snow between stone walls and wooden fences. As the character leaves the courtyard, the camera ascends a stone staircase where the tents recede and the wooden ramparts of the fortress come into view. The scene then tightens through a narrow enclosed stairway lined with wooden walkways and barrels before opening up to reveal a distant stone tower and the dark horizon of the sea. Finally, the camera emerges onto an open cliffside path, passing a tower and moving along a snow-covered trail of bare trees as the warm artificial light shifts into the cool glow of the night sky.
